title: PactPilot Amendment
description: An append-only scope change to a base pact. One file per amendment; files are create-only. When amendments conflict on a path, the latest by commit ancestry wins — never ids or timestamps.

schemaVersion.description: Major-only schema version. Files with an unknown major are invalid.

id.description: Human-chosen slug plus a 6-hex-char entropy suffix. Must equal the filename (without .json). Carries no ordering semantics.

pactId.description: Id of the base pact this amends. Must equal the parent directory name.

description.description: Why the pact was changed. Required — the audit trail is the point. Surfaced in the PR check summary.

addedScope.description: Globs added to the pact's scope. Temporal rules (commit ancestry) decide whether covered work earns Green or Yellow. Within this amendment, addedScope beats removedScope.

removedScope.description: Globs removed from the pact's scope. A removal stands: a PR diff touching an effectively removed path is Red. Conflicts across amendments resolve latest-by-ancestry.
